name: Parchi
description: Warm-paper browser automation assistant with configurable LLM/vision profiles and enterprise-ready controls

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-modals; default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/ https://unpkg.com/ https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ https://esm.sh/ https://esm.run/ https://cdn.skypack.dev/; script-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/ https://unpkg.com/ https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ https://esm.sh/ https://esm.run/ https://cdn.skypack.dev/; connect-src https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/ https://unpkg.com/ https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ https://esm.sh/ https://esm.run/ https://cdn.skypack.dev/ https://t1.gstatic.com/; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/ https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/ https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
